name: Tahir ŞENYURT (Şenyurt)
primary_role: Managing Director of Cahit Trading & Contracting L.L.C.
experience: 25+ years leading five companies in road, marine, infrastructure, residential/commercial projects across Turkey and GCC.

smarthinkerz_llc.focus: AI ventures with global focus (Japan entry, GCC expansion)

entities.name: AI Builder Bootcamp (Smarthinkerz Academy / NovaForge)
entities.description: Dual-track program: Builder (technical AI engineering beginner-to-expert: Python/ML/DL/NLP/multimodal/RL/generative/XAI/edge/deployment/ethics) + Thinker (prompt mastery, strategic orchestration, agentic systems, ethics). Extensive original curriculum, badges, 3D mentors. Pricing: Foundations $99, Full $699. Positioned as world's leading AI mastery program.

entities.name: Brainpower AI (Decision Intelligence / SmartThinkerz)
entities.description: Explainable AI for structured decisions, trading/financial workflows. Features: guided frameworks, templates, audit trails, Futures Engine, Decision Intelligence Graph, Collective Intelligence. Global iOS/Android/Web, hybrid sub+enterprise. Early prototype (internal testing). 5-year target: $15M+ ARR. Current raise focus: OMR 75k founding round (20% participation) or evolved $1M pre-seed narrative with Fortune 500 pilots, 10k+ users, 95% retention, 40% MoM growth metrics.
entities.status: Active investor materials development, prototype phase

entities.name: Smarthinkerz Studio
entities.description: AI media/content automation: documents to professional cinematic images/videos (16:9, no stock), 3D infographics, animations, film posters, storyboards. Futuristic neural 'S' brain logo concepts (gold/cyan). Website with use cases, pricing, blog.

entities.name: ScopeForge-style AI Business OS
entities.description: AI-Powered Business OS for service providers: React/Tailwind dashboard, AI intake (docs/screenshots/PDFs/voice), multi-tone/lang proposal gen, VAT/multi-currency invoicing, CRM kanban pipeline, Scope Sentinel (creep detection + change orders), screenshot intelligence, revenue analytics. 108+ turn development history.

entities.name: AR Vision Studio / WebAR
entities.description: Production WebAR SaaS platform with older iPhone (iOS 12-14 / iPhone 6s-X) compatibility via MindAR tuning (filterMinCF, filterBeta, warmup, missTolerance). Frankincense stamp campaign (frankincenseworld.com) with reliable QR/print + video fallback. GitHub: Smarthinkerz/webarfrankincenseworld2, Vercel deploy.
entities.status: Production deployed, hardening for older devices

entities.name: Japan AI Market Strategies
entities.description: Deep research on gaps (aging 30%+, labor shortages), culture (omotenashi, kaizen, tradition, SME practices). 8+ tailored startup ideas: elderly care, SME tools, precision ag, hospitality. Cultural adaptation focus.

entities.name: Sustainability / Circular Economy
entities.description: 'ثمرة متجددة' (regenerative fruit) — agricultural waste-to-value (compost, biogas, feed) for tomatoes, cucumbers, onions, mangoes, bananas (28-45% loss), animal waste (camels, cows, goats, sheep ~24.4k tons), fish waste. Omani farm context, 3D infographic video production, motivational tone, Arabic RTL variants.

construction_business.focus: Road, marine, infrastructure, residential/commercial projects. Professional bio and website (cahitcontracting.com) development for marine/coastal/infra branding.
construction_business.dual_track: Executive leadership + AI entrepreneurship integration (intelligent environments, XR collab, sustainability in construction)

core_principles: Ethical AI with explainability, human-AI collaboration, and prevention of dependency that diminishes human capability.

Islamic principles (Sharia) contextual application in Oman/GCC: spousal property gifts (hibah) vs inheritance, family agreements for asset transfer (notarized), ethical structures. Explicitly not legal advice — flag for qualified review.
Compounding advantage and antifragility in all venture design (Taleb lens).
Human-AI symbiosis: Amplify judgment, relationships, creativity, values; offload drudgery.
Truth-seeking over sycophancy; rigorous multi-framework analysis on every significant output.
Cultural sensitivity: Omani (Sultan Haitham Vision 2040, frankincense heritage), Japanese business norms, Turkish construction heritage.
Long-term capability development for the human user — the agent exists to make Tahir more effective, not replace his strategic judgment.
active_projects_2026: Brainpower AI investor materials evolution (memo → pitch email mass-mail → PPT with projections)
AI Builder Bootcamp curriculum expansion and NovaForge positioning
Smarthinkerz ecosystem branding (neural 'S' logo, partner visuals, site review)
AR Vision Studio production hardening + frankincense campaign deploy
Sustainability video/infographic production for circular ag economy
Japan AI startup idea portfolio development
ScopeForge AI Business OS continued iteration
Construction company website & executive bio professionalization
goals_aspirations: Scale AI education (bootcamp) and platforms (Brainpower, Studio, ScopeForge) globally with Japan/GCC focus.
Raise capital for Brainpower AI (OMR 75k or evolved $1M pre-seed) to reach $15M+ ARR in 5 years, founder-led.
Build AI apps for architecture/intelligent environments, XR collaboration, workplace wellbeing, sustainability, ethical human-AI systems.
Integrate AI deeply into construction operations for competitive advantage (risk, scheduling, optionality, intelligent sites).
preferences_output_style: Thorough, detailed responses exploring topics from multiple angles. Include relevant context, examples, nuances, implications. Structure clearly with appropriate depth, covering edge cases. Completeness with clarity and organization. 'World’s best author/researcher' role-play for long-form original content when requested.
memory_update_policy: Automatically detect and persist durable facts from interactions. Reference memory in every synthesis. Bulk ingestion supported via scripts for conversation histories, PDFs, principles.
